motion_styles.name: natural casual
motion_styles.description: relaxed, everyday movement with organic weight and pacing

motion_styles.name: slow and deliberate
motion_styles.description: measured, intentional motion with clear weight and control

motion_styles.name: slow-motion ethereal
motion_styles.description: fluid ultra-slow movement, hair and fabric floating, hyper-detailed motion

motion_styles.name: fast-paced energetic
motion_styles.description: quick confident strides, rapid gestures, high-energy movement

motion_styles.name: floaty weightless
motion_styles.description: graceful low-gravity movement, gentle drift, soft landings

motion_styles.name: fluid graceful
motion_styles.description: dance-like flowing motion, smooth arcs, elegant transitions

motion_styles.name: mechanical robotic
motion_styles.description: stiff precise servo-like joint movement, calculated gestures

motion_styles.name: explosive action
motion_styles.description: sudden bursts of power, impact reactions, high-intensity force

motion_styles.name: subtle breathing
motion_styles.description: minimal movement, gentle chest rise, micro-expressions, stillness with life

motion_styles.name: epic cinematic
motion_styles.description: heroic dramatic movement, strong poses held and released, cinematic timing

motion_styles.name: jerky mechanical
motion_styles.description: stuttering motion, gear-like movements, industrial precision

motion_styles.name: glitchy digital
motion_styles.description: erratic pixelated movement, frame skips, corrupted animation

motion_styles.name: liquid flowing
motion_styles.description: melted, amorphous motion, shape-shifting fluidity

motion_styles.name: puppet-like
motion_styles.description: jointed marionette movement, exaggerated articulation

motion_styles.name: ghostly ethereal
motion_styles.description: translucent drifting, spectral movement, otherworldly grace

motion_styles.name: animalistic predatory
motion_styles.description: stalking motion, sudden pounces, feral intensity

motion_styles.name: dance rhythmic
motion_styles.description: choreographed steps, musical timing, expressive body language

motion_styles.name: combat martial
motion_styles.description: trained fighting movements, precise strikes, defensive positioning

motion_styles.name: intimate tender
motion_styles.description: gentle touches, close proximity movement, emotional physicality

motion_styles.name: chaotic random
motion_styles.description: unpredictable flailing, accidental motion, comedic clumsiness

motion_styles.name: hypnotic mesmerizing
motion_styles.description: repetitive swaying, trance-like motion, captivating rhythm

motion_styles.name: powerful dominant
motion_styles.description: commanding presence, forceful gestures, authoritative movement

motion_styles.name: vulnerable hesitant
motion_styles.description: uncertain steps, protective postures, timid body language

motion_styles.name: celebratory joyful
motion_styles.description: exuberant leaps, triumphant poses, enthusiastic energy

motion_styles.name: meditative calm
motion_styles.description: centered movement, mindful gestures, peaceful flow

motion_phases.name: entry into frame
motion_phases.description: subject moves or appears from outside the frame edge

motion_phases.name: sustained action
motion_phases.description: subject continues an ongoing motion throughout the clip

motion_phases.name: exit from frame
motion_phases.description: subject moves toward and beyond the frame edge

motion_phases.name: full action sequence
motion_phases.description: complete motion arc from start through peak to resolution

motion_phases.name: reaction moment
motion_phases.description: subject reacts to something — turns, pauses, responds expressively

motion_phases.name: approach and engage
motion_phases.description: subject moves closer to interact with another element or person

motion_phases.name: retreat and withdraw
motion_phases.description: subject moves away or disengages from interaction

motion_phases.name: transformation change
motion_phases.description: subject undergoes physical or positional transformation

motion_phases.name: exploration discovery
motion_phases.description: subject investigates or discovers elements in the environment

motion_phases.name: performance display
motion_phases.description: subject demonstrates skill, dance, or expressive movement

motion_phases.name: rest and recovery
motion_phases.description: subject settles into stillness after activity

motion_phases.name: anticipation buildup
motion_phases.description: preparatory movement building toward an action

motion_phases.name: climax peak
motion_phases.description: most intense moment of movement in the sequence

motion_phases.name: resolution settle
motion_phases.description: movement winds down to completion or new state
